title: Is Frozen Food Less Healthy?

scenes.text: Are frozen foods a health risk? Let's clarify!
scenes.label: MYTH: Frozen Food is Unhealthy

scenes.text: Many believe frozen foods are inferior to fresh produce.
scenes.label: MYTH: Fresh is Always Better

scenes.text: However, frozen fruits and vegetables can retain similar nutritional value to fresh ones, as they are often frozen at peak ripeness.
scenes.label: TRUTH: Frozen Can Be Just as Nutritious

scenes.text: Follow for the wellness basics that matter.

description: Is frozen food less healthy than fresh? Unearth the real benefits of frozen produce. Follow for more health insights!
